title: BEM-596 curator inbox router
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
curator_inbox=Path('governance/curator/inbox'); curator_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
role_inbox=Path('governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'); role_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending'); pending.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'CURATOR_INBOX_ROUTER.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-596 | Curator Inbox Router'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:53 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Назначение'+sep+sep+'Решение оператора после попадания в `governance/curator/inbox/` автоматически маршрутизируется во внутренний контур через role-orchestrator inbox.'+sep+sep+'## Поток'+sep+sep+'operator_decisions -> curator/inbox -> role_orchestrator/inbox -> internal contour.'+sep+sep+'## Правило'+sep+sep+'Куратор не должен быть ручным буфером. Любой curator intake должен получить machine-readable route package.'+sep)

script=scripts/'curator_inbox_router.py'
source=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'CURATOR_INBOX = Path("governance/curator/inbox")',
'ROLE_INBOX = Path("governance/role_orchestrator/inbox")',
'PENDING_DIR = Path("governance/tasks/pending")',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/curator_inbox_router_state.json")',
'TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/curator_inbox_router_result.md")',
'def load_json(path, default):',
'    if path.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return default',
'    return default',
'def save_json(path, obj):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    path.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:',
'        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP)',
'def route_for_intake(path, intake):',
'    decision_id = str(intake.get("decision_id") or path.stem)',
'    route = {',
'        "schema_version": "role_orchestrator_intake.v1",',
'        "record_type": "curator_operator_decision_route",',
'        "decision_id": decision_id,',
'        "source_file": str(path),',
'        "from_role": "curator",',
'        "to_role": "role_orchestrator",',
'        "next_route": intake.get("next_route") or "internal_contour",',
'        "operator_choice": intake.get("operator_choice"),',
'        "selected_option": intake.get("selected_option"),',
'        "question": intake.get("question"),',
'        "status": "ready_for_role_orchestrator",',
'        "created_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'        "payload": intake,',
'    }',
'    return decision_id, route',
'state = load_json(STATE_PATH, {})',
'processed = set(state.get("processed_intakes", []))',
'CURATOR_INBOX.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'ROLE_INBOX.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'PENDING_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'created = []',
'for path in sorted(CURATOR_INBOX.glob("*.json"), key=lambda p: str(p)):',
'    if str(path) in processed:',
'        continue',
'    intake = load_json(path, {})',
'    decision_id, route = route_for_intake(path, intake)',
'    out = ROLE_INBOX / ("curator_operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".json")',
'    save_json(out, route)',
'    task = PENDING_DIR / ("role_orchestrator_operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".md")',
'    task.write_text("# Role Orchestrator Intake | Operator Decision" + SEP + SEP + "Decision: " + decision_id + SEP + "Choice: " + str(route.get("operator_choice")) + SEP + "Selected option: " + str(route.get("selected_option")) + SEP + SEP + "Next: route to internal contour according to curator package." + SEP + SEP + "Blocker: null" + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, route)',
'    created.append(str(out))',
'    processed.add(str(path))',
'state["processed_intakes"] = sorted(processed)',
'state["last_run"] = {"created": created, "count": len(created), "status": "completed", "blocker": None}',
'save_json(STATE_PATH, state)',
'REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'report = ["# BEM-596 | Curator Inbox Router Result", "", "Дата: workflow_runtime", "", "## Created", json.dumps(created, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), "", "## Blocker", "null"]',
'REPORT_PATH.write_text(SEP.join(report) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(state["last_run"], ensure_ascii=False))',
]
script.write_text(sep.join(source)+sep)

workflow=wfs/'curator-inbox-router.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Curator Inbox Router

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/curator/inbox/**'
      - 'scripts/curator_inbox_router.py'
      - '.github/workflows/curator-inbox-router.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: curator-inbox-router
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  route-curator-inbox:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check router script
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/curator_inbox_router.py

      - name: Route curator inbox to role orchestrator
        run: python3 scripts/curator_inbox_router.py

      - name: Commit router result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/curator_inbox_router_state.json governance/role_orchestrator/inbox governance/tasks/pending governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/curator_inbox_router_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-596 curator inbox router result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

report=reports/'bem596_curator_inbox_router.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-596 | Curator Inbox Router | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:53 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Implemented curator inbox router from governance/curator/inbox to governance/role_orchestrator/inbox with pending task creation.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem596_curator_inbox_router','cycle_id':'bem596-curator-inbox-router','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(script),'role_inbox':str(role_inbox),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:53 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem596_curator_inbox_router']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(script),'role_inbox':str(role_inbox),'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:53 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem596_curator_inbox_router.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-596 PASS: curator inbox router implemented.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(script),str(workflow),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Implemented curator inbox router to role_orchestrator inbox with pending task creation')
"""
No issue comments.
